title: dryopteris maxima
intro: Dryopteris maxima, also known as the giant wood fern, is a species of fern native to China and Japan. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and sore throats. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help reduce swelling and prevent infections. Dryopteris maxima can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
